pool_recommendation.strategy_note: Large pool: the consensus champion is nearly worthless EV. Picking the same team as 150 other entries means you split the pot even if they win. Own your champion pick with maximum leverage — high win prob, low public share.
pool_recommendation.primary_reason: Illinois: 8.2% title probability, 2.6% public pick share (3.10× value, 31.9% Final Four probability). Estimated ~5 other entries in your pool will pick this team — but at 3.1× value, this is the highest-leverage champion available.
